title: The Worst Generation Stands Before Kaido and Big Mom
description: On pages 0–3, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, King, Ace as The raid reaches its decisive stage as the Tobiroppo are revealed, Yamato remembers Ace, and the Worst Generation reaches the rooftop to face Kaido and Big Mom.
scene: The raid reaches its decisive stage as the Tobiroppo are revealed, Yamato remembers Ace, and the Worst Generation reaches the rooftop to face Kaido and Big Mom.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: This is all we could do...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Go ahead, these stairs lead to the roof!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: You know, I still haven't forgotten...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: ...When you protected Ra120 with your lives!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Damn it! What kind of power is this? Is he invincible or what?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Woah! You could've warned me atleast!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Mo40- Nosuke, I never would've though...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: _That I would have the opportunity to meet you someday.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I will be giving it back to you...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I had found it near the river of Oden Castle on that day...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ... and the emotions he experienced when traveling across the world are recorded!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You were born on white- beard's ship, right?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: And then, moved to Roger's ship!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...It is said that after twenty years have past...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: A group of young and powerful pirates will arrive!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I was thinking that ace would be one of them, but...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: ...when I first learned of his death..

dialogue.speaker: King
dialogue.text: I just said it without thinking!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Forget what I said! And more import- tantly...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: SABO AND I WILL NEVER FORGIVE YOU!

summary: This section advances the Wano - The Worst Generation Reaches the Roof storyline with 41 dialogue beats. The raid reaches its decisive stage as the Tobiroppo are revealed, Yamato remembers Ace, and the Worst Generation reaches the rooftop to face Kaido and Big Mom.
